items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.content: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.content: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.content: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
The hardest question to answer about AI-fueled delusions

items.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
items.summary: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.
items.content: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.

items.title: OpenAI’s Sora was the creepiest app on your phone — now it’s shutting down
items.summary: Though the underlying Sora 2 video- and audio-generation model is scarily impressive, there was not sustained interest in an AI-only social feed.
items.content: Though the underlying Sora 2 video- and audio-generation model is scarily impressive, there was not sustained interest in an AI-only social feed.

items.title: Kentucky woman rejects $26M offer to turn her farm into a data center
items.summary: A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.
items.content: A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.

items.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
items.summary: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards.
items.content: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards.

items.title: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
items.summary: The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.
items.content: The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.

items.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
items.summary: With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.
items.content: With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.

items.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
items.summary: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.
items.content: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

items.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
items.summary: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.
items.content: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.

items.title: Google TV’s new Gemini features keep fans updated on sports teams and more
items.summary: Three Gemini-powered features are coming to your Google TV. This includes visual responses, deep dives, and sports briefs.
items.content: Three Gemini-powered features are coming to your Google TV. This includes visual responses, deep dives, and sports briefs.

items.title: OpenAI adds open source tools to help developers build for teen safety
items.summary: Rather than working from scratch to figure out how to make AI safer for teens, developers can use these policies to fortify what they build.
items.content: Rather than working from scratch to figure out how to make AI safer for teens, developers can use these policies to fortify what they build.

items.title: Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK
items.summary:
Learn how to integrate the Copilot SDK into a React Native app to generate AI-powered issue summaries, with production patterns for graceful degradation and caching.

The post Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

items.title: GitHub expands application security coverage with AI‑powered detections
items.summary:
CodeQL and AI‑powered detections work together in GitHub Code Security to identify vulnerabilities across more languages and frameworks.

The post GitHub expands application security coverage with AI‑powered detections appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
